note: Video sources for highlights ingestion. Mirror Baseball Project's pattern: YouTube Data API v3 pull from a curated channel allowlist (playlistItems.list, 1 unit/query) rather than keyword search (search.list, 100 units/query). Shares Baseball's single YouTube API key. **Critical lesson from Baseball: MLB's official YouTube disables third-party embedding (Error 153). Default rendering is thumbnail + click-out, not iframe. Test PPA and MLP channels with a single live iframe on staging in Phase 1 before committing to iframe rendering.**

officialChannels.uploadCadence: near-daily during tour weeks; lighter on dark weeks
officialChannels.notes: Primary pro-match video source. Distributes to CBS, ESPN, Amazon Prime, PickleballTV. Regional sub-channels: PPA Asia, PPA Australia.
Championship Court dual-streams to PickleballTV. Grandstand exclusive to MLP YouTube. ESPN2 holds Premier-level Super Finals distribution — may constrain YT uploads.
Third-tier priority for v1 (APP tour coverage).
Useful for rule-change explainer videos at year-start.

thirdPartyChannels.notes: High-signal highlight channel covering PPA + MLP + APP. URL slug needs verification.

nonYoutubeVideoSources.notes: Primary live broadcast home for PPA/MLP. Not scrapable. Link-out only as 'Where to watch live'.
Linear + streaming home for select PPA events. Link-out.
Holds exclusive distribution for some MLP Premier-level Super Finals. Link-out.
~230K followers. Primary short-form highlight surface. No sanctioned API for individual dev. Link-out.

youtubeApiNotes.apiKeySharing: Shares Baseball Project's single YouTube Data API v3 key (one Google Cloud project, restricted to YouTube Data API v3). Paste into pickleball repo's YOUTUBE_API_KEY GitHub Secret at Phase 1 deployment.
youtubeApiNotes.quotaStrategy: Default quota: 10,000 units/day. search.list costs 100 units/query (max 100 searches/day before exhaustion). Architect around channels.list + playlistItems.list (1 unit each) from a fixed allowlist of the officialChannels above. Cache videoId + publishedAt; diff daily.
youtubeApiNotes.relevanceFilters: Filter by publishedAfter (last 48h) and match title against an allowlist of event/player tokens from tournaments-2026.json + players-seed.json.
youtubeApiNotes.playerSpecificSearch: Reserve search.list for on-demand player-name discovery (e.g., user requests highlights for 'Anna Leigh Waters'). Cache aggressively.
youtubeApiNotes.quotaExtension: If daily pickleball job exceeds ~2000 units consistently, request a quota extension via the YT API audit form.

embedPolicy.rationale: Baseball Project learned that MLB's official YouTube channel disables third-party embedding (Error 153). PPA and MLP channels have not been publicly verified either way as of 2026-04-22.
embedPolicy.phase1TestRequired: Before committing to iframe rendering, ship a single iframe against PPA and MLP channels on a staging URL and observe Error 153 or successful render. Document the result in a KB entry.
embedPolicy.progressiveEnhancement: If embed is allowed, render as iframe with thumbnail fallback. If blocked, render thumbnail + click-out only.

caveats: URL slugs for a few creator channels (SorryNotSorry, Chris Cali) are best-effort from secondary rankings; verify before Phase 1 ingestion.
UPA consolidation may migrate video distribution surfaces during 2026 — re-verify channel URLs at each quarterly foundation refresh.
Paid OTT platforms (PickleballTV, ESPN+, Amazon Prime) are strictly link-out — do not scrape or mirror content.
